name: ClarionAssistant
description: AI-powered Clarion IDE assistant with embedded Claude Code terminal, MCP tools, LSP integration, and IDE automation
changeLog:
## v0.1.1 - 2026-06-09
- CA Data Pad: paste & drag-drop variable definitions (local + global) [Task #aca8c8ed]

## v0.1.1 - 2026-06-08
- Data pad: show all template-instance file scopes via live FileSchemaTree [Task #21849536]

## v0.1.1 - 2026-06-07
- CA Data Pad: populate from app-tree procedure selection (click proc → show its data) [Task #fd5a4607]

## v0.1.1 - 2026-06-07
- Edit + Delete local/global variables from the Modern Data pad (CRUD follow-up to 30bb3125) [Task #0aa0ec42]

## v0.1.1 - 2026-06-06
- Build "Clarion IDE API" DocGraph library from decompiled IDE assemblies [Task #8f1dda1c]

## v0.1.1 - 2026-06-06
- Add local/global variables from the Modern Data pad (via managed FileSchemaTree "Add Column") [Task #30bb3125]

## v0.1.1 - 2026-06-06
- Data Pad customization: reorder, hide, and default-expand sections [Task #a9715652]

## v0.1.1 - 2026-06-06
- Data pad: add a "Local Procedures" section (like Routines, with clickable line → goto) [Task #ff9bfdb3]

## v0.1.1 - 2026-06-06
- Modern Data pad in the native Clarion embeditor [Task #69291ed1]

## v0.1.1 - 2026-06-06
- Modern Data pad — cleanup + drag-drop to editor [Task #c35ed65f]

## v0.1.1 - 2026-06-04
- Golden ticket: right-click a procedure → "Open in Modern Embeditor" (native context-menu hook) [Task #4b82f1de]

## v0.1.1 - 2026-06-04
- Modern Embeditor freezes the Clarion IDE on open and save [Task #c1100fac]

## v0.1.1 - 2026-06-02
- Modern Embeditor: finish diagnostics + evaluate Path B (editor replacement) [Task #fe8a4660]

## v0.1.1 - 2026-05-31
- Modern Embeditor: real code completion (LSP completion provider + C# merge) [Task #28706a3f]

## v0.1.1 - 2026-05-19
- /clarion knowledge: template gotchas (#25) + StringTheory.MakeGuid destructiveness (#23) [Task #6a69b0d8]

## v0.1.1 - 2026-05-19
- LSP CodeGraphBridge self-disables — better-sqlite3 missing from bundled node_modules [Task #11ec4ffa]

## v0.1.1 - 2026-05-11
- Add Codex backend to ClarionAssistant [Task #a32d69dc]

## v0.1.1 - 2026-05-11
- mcp-extra.json sidecar for IDE-pane custom MCP servers (issue #26) [Task #be37229f]

## v0.1.1 - 2026-05-07
- External MCP client access (issue #24) [Task #678f6c38]

## v0.1.1 - 2026-04-26
- Plan-aware backend model selection (Claude / Copilot / Codex) [Task #bc3d6aab]

## v0.1.1 - 2026-04-24
- Rename ClaudeChatControl → AssistantChatControl (and related class/file names) [Task #d08f6ac5]

## v0.1.1 - 2026-04-24
- Extract shared launch scaffolding between LaunchClaudeForTab / LaunchCopilotForTab (block 3rd-backend copy-paste) [Task #a77ec370]

## v0.1.1 - 2026-04-24
- Secure MCP HTTP server: add per-session auth token, tighten CORS, validate Origin/Host [Task #84dbd237]

## v0.1.1 - 2026-04-24
- Fix DocGraph FTS5 extension load failure surfacing as "database disk image is malformed" [Task #bb2ca7ca]

## v0.1.1 - 2026-04-23
- Unify or cross-reference Terminal/AGENTS.md and Terminal/clarion-assistant-prompt.md [Task #13d2dd2c]

## v0.1.1 - 2026-04-23
- Dashboard backend-override dropdown: session-scoped selection applied to all launch buttons [Task #f3e8d1de]

## v0.1.1 - 2026-04-23
- Settings dialog redesign: per-backend tabs + "Set as Default" button + drop General page [Task #436708b6]

## v0.1.1 - 2026-04-12
- Add textDocument/rename to Clarion LSP server (PR to msarson) [Task #b8573967]

## v0.1.1 - 2026-04-06
